videos.title: The More Cards I Discard the More Damage I Deal | $55 Budget Magic
videos.description:
Hobgoblin, Mantled Marauder is one of the scariest uncommons from Spider-Man, potentially dealing tons of damage with haste, so let's discard some cards!

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/budget-magic-50-izzet-hobgoblin-discard-standard
► View this deck with the latest prices: https://www.mtggoldfish.com/deck/7343762#paper

◼ Purchase this deck (paper): http://mtg.fish/Uvluk
◼ Purchase this deck (Magic Online): http://mtg.fish/pxs5D

videos.title: Green Goblin & Doc Ock's Villainous Standard Plans!
videos.description:
